templates.name: Azure Backup Jobs by HTTP
templates.description:
This template is designed to monitor Azure Backup Jobs via HTTP.
It works without any external scripts and uses the script item.

Setup:
  1. Create an Azure service principal via the Azure command-line interface (Azure CLI) for your subscription.
    `az ad sp create-for-rbac --name zabbix --role reader --scope /subscriptions/<subscription_id>`
    See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/create-an-azure-service-principal-azure-cli for more details.
  2. Link the template to a host.
  3. Configure the macros: {$AZURE.APP.ID}, {$AZURE.PASSWORD}, {$AZURE.TENANT.ID}, {$AZURE.SUBSCRIPTION.ID}, and {$AZURE.RESOURCE.ID}.

You can discuss this template or leave feedback on our forum https://www.zabbix.com/forum/zabbix-suggestions-and-feedback/

Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"
templates.readme:
## Overview

This template is designed to monitor Microsoft Azure Backup Jobs via HTTP.
It works without any external scripts and uses the script item.

## Setup

1. Create an Azure service principal via the Azure command-line interface (Azure CLI) for your subscription.

      `az ad sp create-for-rbac --name zabbix --role reader --scope /subscriptions/<subscription_id>`

> See [Azure documentation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/create-an-azure-service-principal-azure-cli) for more details.

2. Link the template to a host.
3. Configure the host wizard configuration fields: `Azure App ID`, `Azure password`, `Azure tenant ID`, `Azure subscription ID`, `Azure Vault ID` and `Backup jobs period`.

items.name: Availability status detailed
items.description: The summary description of the availability status.

items.name: Availability state
items.description:
The availability status of the resource.
0 - Available - no events detected that affect the health of the resource.
1 - Degraded  - your resource detected a loss in performance, although it's still available for use.
2 - Unavailable - the service detected an ongoing platform or non-platform event that affects the health of the resource.
3 - Unknown - Resource Health hasn't received information about the resource for more than 10 minutes.

discovery_rules.name: Azure backup job discovery

item_prototypes.name: Job status [{#JOB.FRIENDLY.NAME}, {#JOB.NAME}]
item_prototypes.description:
Job status.
Possible values:
0 - Unknown
1 - In progress
2 - Queued
3 - Completed
4 - Completed with warnings
5 - Failed
6 - Cancelled
7 - Expired

trigger_prototypes.name: Azure backup jobs: Job cancelled [{#JOB.NAME}]
trigger_prototypes.event_name: Azure backup jobs: Job type [{#JOB.OPERATION}] for [{#JOB.FRIENDLY.NAME}] with ID [{#JOB.NAME}] has cancelled.

trigger_prototypes.name: Azure backup jobs: Job completed with warnings [{#JOB.NAME}]
trigger_prototypes.event_name: Azure backup jobs: Job type [{#JOB.OPERATION}] for [{#JOB.FRIENDLY.NAME}] with ID [{#JOB.NAME}] has completed with warnings.
trigger_prototypes.description: Job has received "Completed with warnings" status.

trigger_prototypes.name: Azure backup jobs: Job expired [{#JOB.NAME}]
trigger_prototypes.event_name: Azure backup jobs: Job type [{#JOB.OPERATION}] for [{#JOB.FRIENDLY.NAME}] with ID [{#JOB.NAME}] has  expired.

trigger_prototypes.name: Azure backup jobs: Job failed [{#JOB.NAME}]
trigger_prototypes.event_name: Azure backup jobs: Job type [{#JOB.OPERATION}] for [{#JOB.FRIENDLY.NAME}] with ID [{#JOB.NAME}] has failed.

trigger_prototypes.name: Azure backup jobs: Job status unknown [{#JOB.NAME}]
trigger_prototypes.event_name: Azure backup jobs: Job type [{#JOB.OPERATION}] for [{#JOB.FRIENDLY.NAME}] with ID [{#JOB.NAME}] is in unknown status.

macros.description: Sets the HTTP proxy value. If this macro is empty, then no proxy is used.

config.label: Backup jobs period
